node.text: James indicated that no interview is required for volunteering, just the willingness to help people.

node.text: James plans to build an app for dog walking and pet care, aiming to connect pet owners with reliable dog walkers.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "dog-sitting app unique") on Session 1 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: James introduced three pets - Max, Daisy, and a new pup named Ned, who are slowly adapting and bonding together.

node.text: James tried programming in college and now it's a big part of his life.

node.text: James got the idea for the virtual world from a stranger he saw while walking his dogs and found inspiring.
James took a great photo of his pets bonding together.

node.text: James offers assistance and suggests breaking down the project into smaller steps, doing research, and seeking help to overcome coding difficulties.
